# Crypto Funding Options

This project accepts crypto donations outside of GitHub Sponsors. GitHub's `FUNDING.yml` only supports official funding platforms, so custom cryptocurrency addresses are documented here.

## BTC
- Network: BTC
- Address: `<insert BTC address>`

## ETH
- Network: ERC20
- Address: `<insert ETH (ERC20) address>`
- Network: BSC (BEP20)
- Address: `<insert ETH on BSC address>`
- Network: TRC20
- Address: `<insert ETH-equivalent TRC20 address>`

## BNB
- Network: BEP20
- Address: `<insert BNB address>`

## SOL
- Network: SOLANA
- Address: `<insert SOL address>`

> Replace the placeholder addresses above with your real wallet addresses.
